title: Global Government Contracts & Tenders Scraper Output
description: Structured official procurement records with amendment-aware identity, deterministic bid/no-bid signals, and a ranked Markdown tender report.

results.title: Government contract and tender records
results.description: Clean dataset items containing stable source-scoped IDs, official public procurement opportunity details, normalized dates, keyword match evidence, and source URLs.

tenderReport.title: Tender intelligence report
tenderReport.description: Ranked Markdown report with fit score, recommended action, buyer, region, value, deadline, evidence, red flags, and official source links.

runSummary.title: Run outcome and source diagnostics
runSummary.description: Safe JSON summary distinguishing success, legitimate empty output, partial source failure, total source outage, and spending-limit stops.
